channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: IPI Nigeria to launch new Press Freedom Hub to celebrate World Press Freedom Day
item.description: On May 6, 2026, the International Press Institute (IPI) Nigeria will open a new headquarters and Press Freedom Hub in Abuja. This event is set to mark World Press Freedom Day. The new facility, locate...

item.title: Activist Protests Target Jeff Bezos at Met Gala Over Amazon and ICE Ties
item.description: Ahead of the 2026 Met Gala, co-chaired for the first time by Amazon founder Jeff Bezos and his wife Lauren Sánchez Bezos, activist group Everyone Hates Elon has organized a series of creative protests...

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship Causes Multiple Deaths and Severe Illness
item.description: A rare hantavirus outbreak aboard the Hondius, a polar expedition cruise ship travelling from Argentina to Europe, has resulted in the deaths of three passengers and serious illness in several others....

item.title: Raptors Review Season Despite First-Round Playoff Exit
item.description: The Toronto Raptors concluded their 2026 NBA season after a 114-102 Game 7 loss to the Cleveland Cavaliers in the first round of the playoffs. Despite the early exit, the team showed significant impro...

item.title: Chelsea Forward Jesse Derry Undergoes Checks After Head Injury in Match Against Nottingham Forest
item.description: Chelsea young talent, Jesse Derry, wey be 18-year-old forward, don dey hospital for precautionary checks after im suffer head injury during di Premier League match wey Chelsea lose 3-1 to Nottingham F...

item.title: West Bengal Chief Secretary directs safeguarding of official files after TMC defeat
item.description: Following the West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026, where the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) secured a clear lead over Mamata Banerjee's Trinamool Congress (TMC), the state’s Chief Secretary, Dushyant Na...

item.title: Vice Ganda explains limited budget affecting It’s Showtime segment production
item.description: Inamin ni Vice Ganda na may mga limitasyon sa budget ang isang segment ng noontime show na It’s Showtime, partikular ang “Laro Laro Pick.” Ayon sa kanya, naapektuhan nito ang kalidad at mga pa-premyo ...

item.title: Kaduna sets up DDR committee to tackle insecurity through dialogue and reintegration
item.description: Kaduna State Governor, Uba Sani, don officially launch the Disarmament, Demobilisation and Reintegration (DDR), Peace and Security Committee as part of efforts to strengthen peace and reduce insecurit...

item.title: Bombay High Court grants bail to Surendra Gadling in Bhima Koregaon case, pending other charges
item.description: The Bombay High Court on Monday granted bail to senior lawyer Surendra Gadling in connection with the Bhima Koregaon case. The court cited prolonged incarceration as an undertrial as a valid reason fo...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Forecasts Rain and Temperature Changes Across Six Regions
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department has issued a forecast indicating continued rainfall across various parts of the country from May 5 to May 11. Areas expected to receive rainfall include the highlan...

item.title: Around 500 residents of Obando return home as air quality improves
item.description: Around 500 residents from Barangays Salambao and Binuangan in Obando, Bulacan, have returned to their homes after temporarily staying at local evacuation centers. This follows an improvement in air qu...

item.title: Ontario to grant special constables authority to stop illegal drug use on transit
item.description: The Ontario government is planning to grant special constables working on select transit systems the authority to arrest individuals using illegal drugs on public transit. Solicitor General Michael Ke...

item.title: SPC plans $60–70 million equity raise to manage debt concerns
item.description: SPC Global, a century-old agribusiness originating as a farmer co-operative in regional Victoria, is preparing to raise between $60 million and $70 million in fresh equity. The company, which returned...

item.title: BJP's Victory in West Bengal: A Shift to Localised Campaign and Welfare Initiatives
item.description: The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) achieved its first-ever electoral victory in West Bengal, securing 113 seats in the 2026 assembly elections. Aided by a more localised campaign and focusing on issues ...

item.title: Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni Resolve Legal Dispute Over 'It Ends With Us'
item.description: Actors Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni have reportedly reached a settlement regarding a lawsuit connected to the film adaptation of 'It Ends With Us.' The legal dispute, which attracted media attentio...

item.title: Dickson Urges Nigerians to Focus on NDC Registration, Ignore Rumours
item.description: Former Bayelsa State Governor, Seriake Dickson, don advise Nigerians make dem no dey mind the wahala wey dey spread about National Democratic Congress (NDC) registration. For statement wey he post for...

item.title: BJP’s Strategies in West Bengal Focus on Booths, Basti Areas, and Urban High-Rises
item.description: In the recent election campaign in West Bengal, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) focused on strengthening its ground presence by reaching out to different demographics. This included the appointment o...

item.title: Poll Shows European Public Supports Idea of Canada Joining the EU, but Membership Remains Unlikely
item.description: A recent survey conducted by YouGov, sampling over 1,000 adults in each of France, Germany, Italy, Poland, and Spain, indicates that a majority or plurality of respondents are open to the idea of Cana...

item.title: Victims of Duterte’s Drug War Object to Defense Appeal at ICC
item.description: The common legal representatives of the victims (CLRV) of former President Rodrigo Duterte’s war on illegal drugs have formally opposed his defense team’s request to appeal the confirmed International...

item.title: BJP achieves significant win in Bengal; Tamil actor Vijay’s film succeeds in Tamil Nadu
item.description: The Assembly elections of 2026 have brought significant developments in two major Indian states. In West Bengal, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has managed to secure more than 200 seats, marking a n...
